evals.prompt:
Generate App Store release notes for version 2.5 from these commits:
- feat(search): add voice input to search bar
- fix(auth): resolve token refresh race on iOS 17
- chore: upgrade fastlane to 2.219
- perf(timeline): lazy-load images to reduce scroll jank
- refactor(network): extract URLSession wrapper
- feat(settings): add dark mode support
evals.expected_output: App Store notes with benefit-focused bullets: voice search, auth fix, timeline performance, dark mode. Chore and refactor commits dropped. Under 4000 chars.

evals.prompt: Generate Google Play Store release notes for the same version 2.5 changes. Remember the 500 character limit.
evals.expected_output: Compressed bullets for top 3-5 user-facing changes. Under 500 characters. No internal jargon.

evals.prompt:
Filter this commit list for the changelog:
- fix(cart): incorrect total when discount applied
- ci: add nightly build job
- feat(checkout): save address for faster repeat orders
- deps: bump retrofit 2.9->2.10
- test: add PaymentViewModel unit tests
- fix(profile): avatar not loading on slow connections
evals.expected_output: Include: cart fix, checkout save address, profile avatar fix. Drop: ci job, deps bump, test addition — no user impact.

evals.prompt: Write Google Play release notes: new onboarding flow, fixed crash on Android 14 camera, improved battery in background sync, updated analytics SDK.
evals.expected_output: 3 user-facing bullets: onboarding, crash fix, battery. Analytics SDK dropped (internal). Under 500 chars. No jargon.

should_not_trigger: Write unit tests for the checkout flow
Create a Fastfile for CI deployment
Review our code for security vulnerabilities
Generate a test plan for the sprint
